Party Leader: "Ladies and gentlemen, esteemed members of the press, we have gathered here today to address the recent accusations leveled against our party. We take these allegations seriously and assure the public that a thorough investigation is underway."

Journalist: "The party leader seems confident, but the body language of the other officials in the room suggests they may be hiding something. I'll need to dig deeper to get to the bottom of this story."
